title: clethra fagifolia var. bicolor
intro: Clethra fagifolia var. bicolor is a flowering plant, also known as the Sweet Pepperbush, which is native to the southeastern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Its medicinal properties also provide health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Clethra fagifolia var. bicolor can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, making it a versatile herb for various herbal preparations.
